MSG.NAME: sapi gle ssap register server add ok @sapi_gle_ssap_server.c(81),INFO
sapi gle ssap register server already exited @sapi_gle_ssap_server.c(83),ERROR
gle sapi ssaps del server new error @sapi_gle_ssap_server.c(108),ERROR
sapi ssaps add service, protocol:%02x service type:%02x, len:%u @sapi_gle_ssap_server.c(140),INFO
sapi ssaps add property desc not support @sapi_gle_ssap_server.c(187),ERROR
sapi ssaps add property desc property_handle: 0x%02x @sapi_gle_ssap_server.c(192),INFO
sapi ssaps add property desc descr_count = %u @sapi_gle_ssap_server.c(198),INFO
